vocab.example: I strictly allocate a budget for footwear each year to ensure I don't overspend on impulsive purchases.

vocab.meaning: sự vung tiền quá trán/mua sắm xa hoa
vocab.example: Buying those designer boots was a bit of an extravagant splurge, but the quality is truly unparalleled.

vocab.meaning: sự hao mòn tự nhiên qua quá trình sử dụng
vocab.example: Since I walk to work every day, the wear and tear on my shoes is significant, forcing me to buy new pairs frequently.
I view high-quality leather shoes as a long-term investment because they can last for a decade if properly maintained.

vocab.meaning: nhạy cảm về giá (luôn cân nhắc kỹ về giá cả)
vocab.example: When it comes to casual sneakers, I am quite price-sensitive and always look for the best deals online.
I don't mind paying more for shoes made of premium materials as they offer much better breathability.
Some people spend a fortune on limited edition releases, but I find that hard to justify for my lifestyle.

vocab.meaning: sự thoải mái không gì sánh bằng
vocab.example: I usually spend a bit extra on running shoes because they provide unbeatable comfort during my morning workouts.
As part of my frugal lifestyle, I rarely spend money on fashionable shoes, opting for durability instead.

vocab.meaning: sự trung thành với thương hiệu
vocab.example: My brand loyalty to certain sports labels means I am willing to pay a fixed price without even looking at competitors.
